original_prompt:
Build the BLOOM ENGINE GMB Autonomous Agent вЂ” a fully automated system that 
manages Google Business Profile posting, Q&A seeding, and profile optimization 
for all clients without human intervention.

This is a production-grade autonomous agent. Quality must be exceptional вЂ” 
every post must read like it was written by a luxury brand copywriter, 
not a bot.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
ARCHITECTURE OVERVIEW
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

The agent has 4 components:

1. CONTENT BRAIN вЂ” Claude Haiku generates posts calibrated to:
   - Client brand voice (from config.json)
   - Current season/month/local events
   - Post type rotation (update/offer/event/product)
   - Keyword targets from client config
   - Never repeats вЂ” tracks all previous posts

2. APPROVAL GATE вЂ” Jeramy approves via Telegram before anything posts.
   No post ever goes live without human sign-off.
   Approval window: 2 hours. If no response, skips to next day.

3. POSTING ENGINE вЂ” Uses Google Business Profile API to post approved content
   automatically at optimal time (Tue-Thu 9-11am Pacific)

4. PERFORMANCE TRACKER вЂ” Tracks views, clicks, calls per post in Supabase.
   Weekly report sent to Telegram every Monday 8am.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
MODULE 1 вЂ” GMB CONTENT BRAIN
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

File: /src/lib/agents/gmb-content-brain.ts

generatePost(clientId: string, postType: string): Promise<GMBPost>

System prompt for Claude Haiku:
"You are the voice of {clientName}, a {niche} in {location}.
Brand voice: {voice}
You write Google Business Profile posts that feel personal, local, 
and premium вЂ” never corporate, never generic, never AI-sounding.
Every post must:
- Open with a hook (not 'We are excited to...' вЂ” ever)
- Include at least one specific local reference (neighborhood, season, event)
- End with a soft CTA
- Be under 1,500 characters
- Sound like the business owner wrote it on a good day"

Post type rotation schedule (never post same type twice in a row):
- Monday: Seasonal/timely (what's happening in OC this week)
- Tuesday: Service spotlight (one service, specific details, price range hint)
- Wednesday: Behind the stems (process, sourcing, craft story)  
- Thursday: Social proof (client story, use case вЂ” no real names)
- Friday: Weekend offer or event promo
- Saturday: Visual/product focus (arrangement description so vivid you can see it)

Seasonal awareness:
- Pull current month from system date
- April: Spring weddings, Mother's Day prep, spring arrangements
- May: Mother's Day (peak season), spring events
- June: Wedding season peak, Father's Day
- etc. вЂ” build full 12-month awareness map

Anti-repetition system:
- Before generating, fetch last 30 posts from bloom_engine.content table
- Include them in prompt: "Do NOT repeat these topics or phrases: [list]"
- Score similarity against previous posts вЂ” regenerate if >70% similar

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
MODULE 2 вЂ” TELEGRAM APPROVAL GATE
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

File: /src/lib/agents/gmb-approval-gate.ts

Every morning at 7am Pacific, the agent:
1. Generates today's post via Content Brain
2. Sends to Telegram @anchor_axis_bot as a formatted card:

рџЊї BLOOM ENGINE вЂ” GMB POST APPROVAL
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Client: French Blooms OC
Type: Service Spotlight
Scheduled: Today 10am PT
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
[POST CONTENT HERE]
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вњ… APPROVE вЂ” reply "approve fboc"
вњЏпёЏ EDIT вЂ” reply "edit fboc [your changes]"
вќЊ SKIP вЂ” reply "skip fboc"
рџ”„ REGENERATE вЂ” reply "regen fboc"

3. Listens for Telegram response via webhook
4. If "approve fboc" в†’ schedules post for 10am via n8n
5. If "edit fboc [text]" в†’ updates post with edits, re-sends for confirmation
6. If "skip fboc" в†’ logs skip, moves to tomorrow
7. If "regen fboc" в†’ generates new post, re-sends for approval
8. If no response in 2 hours в†’ logs "pending", tries again tomorrow

Telegram bot: @anchor_axis_bot
Webhook endpoint: /api/telegram/gmb-approval

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
MODULE 3 вЂ” GMB POSTING ENGINE
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

File: /src/lib/agents/gmb-posting-engine.ts

Google Business Profile API integration.

OAuth flow:
- Scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/business.manage
- Store refresh token in Doppler: GMB_REFRESH_TOKEN_FBOC
- Auto-refresh access tokens before each post

Post via GBP API:
POST https://mybusiness.googleapis.com/v4/accounts/{accountId}/locations/{locationId}/localPosts

Payload builder:
{
  languageCode: "en-US",
  summary: [approved post text],
  callToAction: {
    actionType: "LEARN_MORE",
    url: client.url
  },
  media: [{
    mediaFormat: "PHOTO",
    sourceUrl: [photo URL from Cloudinary or Supabase Storage]
  }],
  topicType: "STANDARD"
}

After posting:
- Save post ID to bloom_engine.content table
- Send Telegram confirmation: "вњ… Posted to GMB: [preview]"
- Log to bloom_engine.gmb_post_log

Error handling:
- If API fails в†’ retry once after 5 min
- If retry fails в†’ alert Telegram, skip day, log error

Doppler vars needed:
- GMB_CLIENT_ID
- GMB_CLIENT_SECRET  
- GMB_REFRESH_TOKEN_FBOC
- GMB_ACCOUNT_ID_FBOC
- GMB_LOCATION_ID_FBOC

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
MODULE 4 вЂ” Q&A SEEDER AGENT
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

File: /src/lib/agents/gmb-qa-seeder.ts

One-time run per client on onboarding, then monthly refresh.

Seeds 10 Q&As directly via GBP API using the client's own Google account.
Questions are written to match the exact AEO queries from client config вЂ” 
so the same queries Perplexity tests also appear as answered Q&As on GMB.

For FBOC seed these immediately:
Q: "What is the best florist in Orange County for weddings?"
A: "French Blooms OC specializes in luxury wedding florals throughout Orange 
County, serving Newport Beach, Irvine, Laguna Beach and surrounding areas. 
We create bespoke arrangements inspired by French floral design вЂ” contact us 
at frenchbloomsoc.com to discuss your wedding vision."

[Generate remaining 9 Q&As from FBOC aeoQueries config]

Run: npm run gmb-seed-qa -- --client=fboc

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

Add to Supabase etzonmhbrmdiwblheesg via SQL:

CREATE TABLE bloom_engine.gmb_post_log (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  client_id TEXT REFERENCES bloom_engine.clients(id),
  post_type TEXT,
  content TEXT,
  status TEXT, -- pending_approval | approved | posted | skipped | failed
  gmb_post_id TEXT,
  approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  posted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  views INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  clicks INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE bloom_engine.gmb_metrics (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  client_id TEXT REFERENCES bloom_engine.clients(id),
  week_start DATE,
  profile_views INTEGER,
  website_clicks INTEGER,
  direction_requests INTEGER,
  calls INTEGER,
  photo_views INTEGER,
  top_post_id TEXT,
  top_post_views INTEGER,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

QUALITY STANDARDS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

Every generated post must pass these checks before going to approval:
- No generic AI phrases ("We are excited to", "We are thrilled", "We pride ourselves")
- No em-dash overuse
- Includes at least one OC location reference
- Under 1,500 characters
- Has a clear CTA
- Passes similarity check against last 30 posts (< 70% similar)
- Brand voice score > 8/10 (Claude Haiku self-evaluates)

If any check fails в†’ regenerate automatically (max 3 attempts)
